creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
New distfile requires new diff:

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile ./munger/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile	Wed Sep 12 23:29:54 2007
+++ ./munger/Makefile	Sat Sep 15 14:18:55 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=	munger
-PORTVERSION=	4.140
+PORTVERSION=	4.141
  CATEGORIES=	lang
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mammothcheese.ca/

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo ./munger/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo	Wed Sep 12 23:29:54 2007
+++ ./munger/distinfo	Sun Sep 16 13:06:05 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (munger-4.140.tar.gz) = b89eb5f8ca2183632fa0fb72de2c5640
-SHA256 (munger-4.140.tar.gz) = 
9885ecb2f05b4f810db91b1a7b1c6017af61a79d33435c7a7c72385891886d3c
-SIZE (munger-4.140.tar.gz) = 293105
+MD5 (munger-4.141.tar.gz) = a5aa2b2f67f1c091c97b4617073080f4
+SHA256 (munger-4.141.tar.gz) = 
74f1212ad6555aa239e5c3491b853d0e99f2a41f4dd82825485b63502afe04ff
+SIZE (munger-4.141.tar.gz) = 292336
